title: SRM Resting-state EEG
description: A BIDS-structured resting-state electroencephalography dataset comprising 111 healthy control subjects recorded using a BioSemi ActiveTwo 64-channel system. The dataset includes four-minute continuous EEG recordings acquired with eyes closed, with some subjects having longitudinal recordings at two timepoints. Raw data are provided with average referencing and minimal preprocessing, alongside a cleaned derivative dataset processed through automated artifact removal and channel interpolation.
methods_description: EEG data were recorded using a BioSemi ActiveTwo system with 64 electrodes positioned according to the extended 10-20 system (10-10 scheme). Each recording session consisted of four minutes of continuous resting-state EEG acquired with subjects' eyes closed. Raw signals were rereferenced to average reference without additional filtering. A cleaned derivative dataset was generated using an automated preprocessing pipeline including artifact detection, bad channel identification, and interpolation.
